summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Portal JUST Downloader cron functionality and date filtering features. All new cron job APIs working correctly, date range selection functional, frontend displays cron status properly, and integration between backend scheduler and frontend UI working seamlessly.
passed_tests: GET /api/cron/status - Returns cron status with schedule and next run time
PUT /api/config with cron_enabled=true - Successfully enables cron job
PUT /api/config with cron_enabled=false - Successfully disables cron job
PUT /api/config with date_start and date_end - Sets period filtering correctly
POST /api/search with date_start and date_end - Search with date filtering works
GET /api/stats - Shows cron status (Active/Inactive) in statistics
Frontend Date Selection - Data început and Data sfârșit buttons work with calendar popup
Frontend Cron Switch - Cron Zilnic Activ toggle works correctly
Frontend Cron Time - Hour and minute inputs functional when cron enabled
Frontend Next Run - Displays next scheduled run time correctly
Frontend Stats - Shows cron status as Active/Inactive properly
Configuration Save - All settings including cron and dates save correctly
Search Preview - Works with date range parameters
Real-time UI Updates - Cron status updates immediately after configuration changes
APScheduler Integration - Backend scheduler updates correctly with frontend changes
Date Range Validation - Properly handles date start/end combinations

success_percentage.backend: 100% (16/16 API endpoints passing including new cron features)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components for date selection and cron functionality working)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (Frontend-backend integration for cron scheduling and date filtering working)
